method: Rendered the rebuilt 22-page PDF with pdftoppm after tightening reviewer-facing caveats around Marchenko-Pastur, stable rank, refusal scoring, broad capability retention, and cross-organism external validity. Verified pdffonts reports no Type 3 fonts. Visually inspected the full-paper contact sheet plus the changed abstract and discussion/reference pages. Citations, figure labels, tables, and path references are legible and no clipping, overlap, blank page, duplicate URL, or alignment defects were observed.
